news.t: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U

overview.description: The Tradr 2X Long CLSK Daily ETF (CLSX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement of Cleanspark, Inc. stock. CLSX was launched on Sep 15, 2025 and is issued by Tradr.

data.title: Tradr Launches First Mover Leveraged ETFs on CLSK, CRDO, ENPH, GS and U
data.text: Single-stock funds seek to provide 200% long exposure on a variety of industry leaders NEW YORK , Sept. 16, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Tradr ETFs, a provider of ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and...
